Frequently Asked Questions
1. Rajasthan RPSC Physiotherapist (NSA) Online Form 2026 Start Date?
The online application process started on 23 July 2026.
2. Rajasthan RPSC Physiotherapist (NSA) Exam Date?
The Examination will be conducted in As Per Schedule .
3. Where can I find the syllabus for the Rajasthan RPSC Physiotherapist (NSA) Examination?
The detailed syllabus and examination scheme for the Rajasthan RPSC Assistant Prosecution Officer Examination are available in the official notification. Candidates are advised to read the notification carefully for complete syllabus details.
4. Rajasthan RPSC Physiotherapist Exam 2026 Notification PDF?
Candidates can download the notification through SarkariResult.com.
5. Rajasthan RPSC Physiotherapist (NSA) Online Form 2026 Last Date?
The last date to apply online is 21 August 2026.
6. What is the last date to Update application fee Details?
Candidates can pay the application fee up to 21 August 2026 .
7. How can I apply for Rajasthan RPSC Physiotherapist Exam?
RPSC Rajasthan Physiotherapist (NSA) Online Form 2026 .
tables: Rajasthan RPSC Physiotherapist (NSA) Recruitment 2026 Apply Online

Rajasthan  Public Service Commission ( RPSC ) has released Physiotherapist (NSA) Recruitment 2026 Notification. Those candidates who are interested in this RPSC Physiotherapist Vacancy can apply online from 23 July 2026 to 21 August 2026 . candidates should read the RPSC Physiotherapist (NSA) 2026 Vacancy  information Notification for all the information related to the RPSC exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, information and other types of information and then apply.

Application Fees (OTR) General / BC/OBC Creamy Layer / Other State : 600/- OBC / BC / EWS : 400/- SC / ST : 400/- Correction Charge : 500/- Pay the Exam Fee Through Cash at Rajasthan E Mitra Portal or Through Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking, UPI Payment Mode.

Rajasthan RPSC Physiotherapist (NSA) Notification 2026 : Age Limit as on 01/01/2027 Minimum Age : 18 Years. Maximum Age : 40 Years. Age Relaxation as per Rajasthan Public Service Commission RPSC Physiotherapist Recruitment 2026 Rules.
Rajasthan RPSC Physiotherapist (NSA) Recruitment 2026 : Vacancy Details
10+2 Intermediate with a Diploma in Physiotherapy . Working Knowledge of Hindi Written in Devnagari Script. Knowledge of Rajasthan Culture.
